feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA blog posts in SAP Community

entry.title: Redis on SAP BTP, Hyperscaler Option Now Available for Customers on BTP@China!
entry.content:
Hyperscaler Option

In July 2019, we witnessed an evolution of the SAP BTP strategy with a strong focus on building differentiating business service capabilities and clear intentions to partner with hyperscale cloud providers like Amazon, Microsoft, AliCloud and GCP for commodity technical services like open-source databases and data stores; where these hyperscalers are already market leaders.

In February 2020, considering customer/partner feedback about challenges with the BYOA (Bring Your Own Account) approach, we announced an update to the backing service strategy, with plans to deliver a comprehensively managed backing services offering:

  • Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option
  • PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option

For more details please check SAP BTP Discovery Center and the service documentation on SAP Help Portal.

  • SAP Discovery Center - Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option
  • SAP Help Portal - Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option
  • SAP Discovery Center - PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option
  • SAP Help Portal - PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option

 

Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option

Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option is globally available via CPEA and PAYG commercial models, for China is available via subscription commercial model. Now, Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option is available for customers on BTP@China!

You need to have a Global Account with the proper entitlements to be able to use Redis service.

The number of units of a particular plan/SKU that get consumed when you provision a redis-cache instance depends on the chosen plan and the technical configuration.

The number of SKU units also differ across infrastructure regions, because of the differences in the Redis service offered by the underlying infrastructure provider.

You can choose to use Standard plan (instances based on 2GB memory increase) and Premium Plan (instances based on 4GB memory blocks).

For China, you can refer to Help Portal service documentation: Service Plans and Entitlements AliCloud instance configuration options.

 

Usage

Create Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option instance

After making sure that you have sufficient entitlements quota assigned for your instance, then you can create an instance with CLI. Alternatively, you can create via SAP BTP Cockpit.

cf marketplace -e redis-cache
cf create-service SERVICE PLAN SERVICE_INSTANCE [-c PARAMETERS_AS_JSON]

For example:

cf create-service redis-cache standard redis-cache-instance -c
'{
  "memory": 2, 
  "engine_version": "4.0",
  "eviction_policy": "noeviction",
  "shard_count": 1,
  "node_count": 2
}'

Notes for AliCloud region:

  • Engine version 6.0 not supported.
  • The shard_count can be updated, however it is not allowed to update it from 1 (non-clustered) to 2 or more (clustered instance).
  • Only Redis instances with a shard count of >1 support TLS connections.

 

Retrieve Configurations of Instance If Required Once the Service Instance is Created

cf service <service-instance-name> --guid //Note the service instance id
cf curl /v2/service_instances/<service-instance-id>/parameters

Sample output: 

{
    "engine_version": "4.0",
    "eviction_policy": "noeviction",
    "memory": 2,
    "node_count": 1,
    "shard_count": 2
}

 

Access a Redis-cache Instance from Redis-cli

cf enable-ssh <app-name>
cf restart <app-name>
cf create-service-key <instance-name> <key-name>
cf service-key <instance-name> <key-name>
cf ssh -L 6666:<hostname>:<port> <app-name>
redis-cli [--tls] -c -p 6666 -a <instance-password>

For more details: Access a Redis-cache Instance from Redis-cli

 

Connect to Redis Instance in Cloud Foundry Application

You can do it in the same way as the BYOA (Bring Your Own Account) approach. You can consume the Redis instance via app binding and the app runtime environment variable.

 

Relevant Sources of Information

  • For more information on Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option service, please check SAP Help Portal.
  • For information on Redis pricing and commercial options and regions, please check SAP Discovery Center.

entry.title: Re: Why I switched to Neovim
entry.content: Thanks Dr. David Kunz for sharing this great stuff.

entry.title: BTP@China环境上的Redis on SAP BTP, Hyperscaler Option可面向客户提供！
entry.content:
Hyperscaler Option

2019年7月，我们目睹了SAP BTP战略的演进，强调构建具有差异化业务服务能力，并明确表示打算与超大规模云提供商合作，如Amazon、Microsoft,、AliCloud和GCP，提供开源数据库和数据存储等通用技术服务；而这些超大规模云提供商已经是市场领导者。

2020年2月，考虑到客户/合作伙伴关于BYOA（自带账户）方法面临的挑战的反馈，我们宣布了一项更新来调整支持服务策略，计划提供全面托管的支持服务：

  • Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option
  • PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option

更多详细信息，请阅读SAP BTP Discovery Center和服务文档SAP Help Portal：

  • SAP Discovery Center - Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option
  • SAP Help Portal - Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option
  • SAP Discovery Center - PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option
  • SAP Help Portal - PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option

 

Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option

在全球，Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option 是通过CPEA和PAYG的商业模式来为客户提供服务。在中国，则是通过Subscription的订阅方式。无论如何，现在BTP中国环境上的Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option服务已可面向客户提供！

您需要具有适当权限的Global Account才能使用Redis服务。

在您部署redis-cache实例时消耗的特定计划/SKU单位数量取决于所选择的计划和技术配置。

由于基础架构提供商提供的Redis服务存在差异，不同基础架构区域的SKU单位数量也会有所不同。

您可以选择使用标准（Standard）计划（基于2GB内存增加的实例）和高级（Premium）计划（基于4GB内存块的实例）。

对于中国地区，您可以参考SAP的帮助门户服务文档：服务计划和权限 阿里云实例配置选项。

 

使用方法

创建Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option实例

在确保您的实例被分配了足够的授权配额后，您可以使用CLI创建一个实例。或者，您可以通过SAP BTP Cockpit创建。

cf marketplace -e redis-cache
cf create-service SERVICE PLAN SERVICE_INSTANCE [-c PARAMETERS_AS_JSON]

例如：

cf create-service redis-cache standard redis-cache-instance -c
'{
  "memory": 2, 
  "engine_version": "4.0",
  "eviction_policy": "noeviction",
  "shard_count": 1,
  "node_count": 2
}'

针对BTP@AliCloud的注意事项：

  • 不支持6.0引擎版本。
  • 可以更新shard_count，但不允许将其从1（非集群）更新为2或更多（集群实例）。
  • 仅支持shard count大于1的Redis实例使用TLS连接。

创建服务实例后，根据需要检索实例的配置

cf service <service-instance-name> --guid //Note the service instance id
cf curl /v2/service_instances/<service-instance-id>/parameters

示例输出：

{
 "engine_version": "4.0",
 "eviction_policy": "noeviction",
 "memory": 2,
 "node_count": 1,
 "shard_count": 2
}

用Redis-cli访问Redis实例

cf enable-ssh <app-name>
cf restart <app-name>
cf create-service-key <instance-name> <key-name>
cf service-key <instance-name> <key-name>
cf ssh -L 6666:<hostname>:<port> <app-name>
redis-cli [--tls] -c -p 6666 -a <instance-password>

更多详细信息：从Redis-cli访问Redis-cache实例

在Cloud Foundry应用程序中访问Redis实例

您可以按照BYOA（自带账户）方法进行。您可以通过应用绑定和应用运行时环境变量来获得Redis实例的详细信息。

相关的信息来源

  • 关于Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option的更多信息，请查看SAP Help Portal。
  • 关于Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option的定价、商业选项和地区的信息，请查看SAP Discovery Center。

entry.title: Re: Fiori Adoptation Project for Extending Standard Fiori Application for onPremise using BAS
entry.content:
Good post.

However it is worth to point out this approach is technically not a "Adaptation" project. It is rather a "legacy" way of extension provided by WebIDE initially now in BAS, which won't be applicable to most "modern" fiori apps.

Some more background information is here

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/extending-legacy-fiori-apps-in-bas/ba-p/13579887

entry.title: Turning Strategy into Reality with Business Architecture
entry.content:
Day 3 of 30 Days of EA Learning

Abstract:

Whynde Kuehn underscores the criticality of Business Architecture in seamlessly translating strategic vision into executable blueprints. Advocating for a rigorous methodology, Kuehn accentuates the imperative for well-defined strategic objectives, cohesive endeavors, and lucid change management processes to guarantee triumphant strategy realization across the enterprise landscape, in alignment with SAP's Business Transformation strategies.

In this session:

From Vision to Execution: Mastering Strategy with Business Architecture.

Explore the indispensable role of Business Architecture in converting strategic intents into tangible outcomes with Whynde Kuehn at the SAP Enterprise Architects Forum 2024. Delve into a strategic execution framework that ensures precision, congruence, and clarity, fostering a structured and transparent approach to enterprise transformation and change management, as advocated by Kuehn.

Key Themes – AI Assisted: 

Leverage business architecture as the bridge for turning strategic vision into tangible outcomes.

  • Implement business architecture to ensure strategic plans are transformed into organized actions across all organizational levels.
  • Utilize it to fill the critical gap between strategy development and its practical execution, focusing on alignment across people, processes, information, and technology.

Shift from enumerating initiatives to actively building and enhancing strategic capabilities for effective strategy execution.

  • Prioritize the development and reinforcement of strategic capabilities over merely listing initiatives.
  • Encourage wrapping initiatives around these strategic capabilities, aiming for direct contributions to the organization’s strategic goals.

Champion strategy execution as a human-centric journey, prioritizing people and change management over mere architectural considerations.

  • Emphasize the importance of people and their experiences in the execution of strategies, advocating for a focus on change management and adaptive ways of working.
  • Recognize and address the human aspects of transformation to foster a supportive and engaged organizational culture.

Employ business architecture to form, translate, and keep strategy dynamic, guiding informed investment decisions through an enterprise perspective.

  • Use business architecture to maintain a living strategy that adapts over time, supporting effective translation from vision to execution.
  • Ensure strategic investments are aligned with organizational capabilities and strategic objectives, leveraging a comprehensive understanding of the business architecture.

Architect change collaboratively, developing a shared understanding of its implications for our business.        

  • Foster a collective approach to change, using business architecture to clarify and coordinate the transformation efforts.
  • Cultivate a shared vision of change across the organization, ensuring all efforts are aligned and contribute to the overarching business goals.

Remember:

The power of clear intent translated into organized effort can change the world.  It is what turns strategy into reality, making the seemingly impossible possible.  Business architecture gives organizations that power. -  Whynde Kuehn

Access Presentation: Here

Watch the YouTube Video of Whydne's Presentation: Here

 

Nugget of Next:

Watch for more information later this month on how to access the "Business Architecture for Enterprise Architects Masterclass" on demand. 

Flag Photo with Whynde:

entry.title: Redis on SAP BTP, Hyperscaler Option Now Available for Customers on BTP@China!
entry.content:
Hyperscaler Option

In July 2019, we witnessed an evolution of the SAP BTP strategy with a strong focus on building differentiating business service capabilities and clear intentions to partner with hyperscale cloud providers like Amazon, Microsoft, AliCloud and GCP for commodity technical services like open-source databases and data stores; where these hyperscalers are already market leaders.

In February 2020, considering customer/partner feedback about challenges with the BYOA (Bring Your Own Account) approach, we announced an update to the backing service strategy, with plans to deliver a comprehensively managed backing services offering:

  • Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option
  • PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option

For more details please check SAP BTP Discovery Center and the service documentation on SAP Help Portal.

  • SAP Discovery Center - Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option
  • SAP Help Portal - Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option
  • SAP Discovery Center - PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option
  • SAP Help Portal - PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option

 

Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option

Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option is globally available via CPEA and PAYG commercial models, for China is available via subscription commercial model. Now, Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option is available for customers on BTP@China!

You need to have a Global Account with the proper entitlements to be able to use Redis service.

The number of units of a particular plan/SKU that get consumed when you provision a redis-cache instance depends on the chosen plan and the technical configuration.

The number of SKU units also differ across infrastructure regions, because of the differences in the Redis service offered by the underlying infrastructure provider.

You can choose to use Standard plan (instances based on 2GB memory increase) and Premium Plan (instances based on 4GB memory blocks).

For China you can refer to Help Portal service documentation: Service Plans and Entitlements AliCloud instance configuration options.

 

Usage

Create Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option instance

After making sure that you have sufficient entitlements quota assigned for your instance, then you can create an instance with CLI. Alternatively, you can create via SAP BTP Cockpit.

cf marketplace -e redis-cache
cf create-service SERVICE PLAN SERVICE_INSTANCE [-c PARAMETERS_AS_JSON]

For example:

cf create-service redis-cache standard redis-cache-instance -c
'{
  "memory": 2, 
  "engine_version": "4.0",
  "eviction_policy": "noeviction",
  "shard_count": 1,
  "node_count": 2
}'

Notes for AliCloud region:

  • Engine version 6.0 not supported.
  • The shard_count can be updated, however it is not allowed to update it from 1 (non-clustered) to 2 or more (clustered instance).
  • Only Redis instances with a shard count of >1 support TLS connections.

 

Retrieve Configurations of Instance If Required Once the Service Instance is Created

cf service <service-instance-name> --guid //Note the service instance id
cf curl /v2/service_instances/<service-instance-id>/parameters

Sample output: 

{
    "engine_version": "4.0",
    "eviction_policy": "noeviction",
    "memory": 2,
    "node_count": 1,
    "shard_count": 2
}

 

Access a Redis-cache Instance from Redis-cli

cf enable-ssh <app-name>
cf restart <app-name>
cf create-service-key <instance-name> <key-name>
cf service-key <instance-name> <key-name>
cf ssh -L 6666:<hostname>:<port> <app-name>
redis-cli [--tls] -c -p 6666 -a <instance-password>

For more details: Access a Redis-cache Instance from Redis-cli

 

Connect to Redis Instance in Cloud Foundry Application

You can do it in the same way as the BYOA (Bring Your Own Account) approach. You can consume the Redis instance via app binding and the app runtime environment variable.

 

Relevant Sources of Information

  • For more information on Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option service, please check SAP Help Portal.
  • For information on Redis pricing and commercial options and regions, please check SAP Discovery Center.

entry.title: Re: SAP Enterprise Service Management
entry.content:
@pranoyk : there is no fixed timeline.

Will update you once it is LIVE

entry.title: Capitalizing on AI: The Future of Industries
entry.content:
As one delves into the comprehensive examination of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and its implementation across various industries, it's evident that capitalizing on AI's capabilities could be a game-changer for companies. The recent advancement of AI from simply a buzz term to a practical reality is revolutionizing numerous sectors, including transcription software, customer service, translation, writing, and social media marketing.

Not only has this technological shift been advantageous for businesses, but it has also positively influenced stock growth for companies heavily invested in AI. Nevertheless, amidst the benefits, there are valid concerns about AI's potential misuse. For instance, creating fake videos and spreading misinformation can be particularly hazardous during electoral periods.

As AI continues its game-changing course, a potential digital divide is looming between those without access to AI and the internet. In response to this rapidly evolving industry, it becomes critical to upscale ourselves with AI capabilities to stay in line with digital advancements.

Attention is drawn to Generative Pre-trained Transformers (GPT), an advanced AI that harnesses immense internet data for sharper decision-making. However, there is an evident risk of data accuracy in GPT due to biased internet content or misinformation. Despite these challenges, GPT's data processing capacity trumps human capabilities, promising a future filled with advancements.

Prospects are also being explored for AI to communicate in everyday language, eliminating the need for specific technical jargon. Moreover, it's essential to maintain data accuracy and reliability by seeking validation and citation when utilizing AI for information generation.

The future looks promising with personalized experiences based on individuals' preferences as AI matures. There's a significant shift towards artificial general intelligence (AGI), where systems may possess logical and thinking abilities similar to the human brain. As professionals, we are urged to stay abreast of AI development and their influential role in our everyday lives.

For more such research, you can follow my newsletter here.

entry.title: Re: Create Custom Field F4 Help View using CDS for In App Extension
entry.content:
Hi @SamannayaRoy ,

I am not clear on this point.

Could you please elaborate this.

Thanks in advance for your efforts and information.

 

 

Regards,

Anurag

SAP BTP,  ABAP environment     SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database

entry.title: Re: Deletion of Master and Transactional Data (ILM) in SAP S/4HANA Cloud,Public Edition-Link Collect
entry.content:
Hi @Saumitra,

Thanks for the summary blog of ILM, really clear and helpful.
We can use t-cd DB15 to easily find an archiving object for a table, or find the table by giving the object in on-premise.
Is there any similar function we can use in S/4HANA public cloud?

entry.title: SAP HANA Data Provisioning Learning Journey
entry.content:
According to a survey that SAP conducted with customers a few years ago, over 70% of IT decision-makers don't even know where data actually resides within their systems.

Of course, this is not due to a lack of competence on the part of those surveyed, but rather to the historically grown, heterogeneous system landscapes that have emerged in their organizations over time. In other words, your data is distributed across multiple ERP, Datawarehouse, Big Data and other source systems. This inevitably raises an important question for many SAP customers: What is the best way to get data that I want to use into my target system?

Most of the people would now think of SAP Integration Suite. But there is another option, SAP HANA`s native data provisioning capabilities with the main tools Smart Data Access and Smart Data Integration. Join now our new learning journey "Provisioning Data to SAP HANA" and familiarize yourself with the feature scope of the provided tool set.   

SAP Product Learning CoE Analytics Team

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) Transport Guideline
entry.content:
For anyone reviewing this blog in 2024, permissions are not part of the import and export process.  Some blogs contradict this but the official SAP guidance document is correct:

a) Report permissions will not be updated in 'Overwrite' mode
b) Report permissions will inherit those of the folder being imported into (if 'Drop Objects' is selected for import)
c) Folder permissions will never be updated and you cannot 'Drop' a folder using 'Drop Objects' import option.

Thanks
Ian.

entry.title: Re: GRC Tuesdays: Announcing SAP’s plans for a next generation Governance, Risk, and Compliance Plat
entry.content:
Hi Rob,

We are actually not sunsetting anything, which you can hopefully tell based on our new product release.

And while we cannot yet give a definite answer on end of maintenance for the new product, kindly be assured that we will share the details as soon as they are available.

We will always give our customers sufficient time to plan ahead (that is why we share updates at the earliest possible with not having all details available such as EOM, or naming, etc.) and have no intention to leave any customer behind.

Be assured, that the new product release is intended to stay, just as the history and evolution of our GRC products demonstrates.

Thanks for your kind understanding,

marie-luise

entry.title: Re: New Version of SAP Readiness Check for SAP BW/4HANA Is Now Live
entry.content:
Hello Astrid,

 we implemented last week the new Readiness Check central note 3061594 on our BW 7.5 on HANA System. however we encounter an issue while transporting The implemented Note Analyser from Test to Production-System.

Transport-error -> 
Programm SAPLRS_B4HANA_CODESCAN: Syntaxfehler Zeile 000000
Das Programm 'SAPLRS_B4HANA_CODESCAN' ist gemäß den Programmattributen nicht unicodefähig.

Can you please tell us, what we should do in this case?

Thank you ? Best regards

Valerie

entry.title: Re: Joining us from the AppGyver Forum? Start here in the SAP Builders Group!
entry.content:
Good day, @EsmeeX 

I wanted to let you know that I was not able to access the link you provided in private message because it had already expired. May I request you to kindly resend the link? Your kind assistance in this regard would be highly appreciated, and if it's possible, I would like to request around 24 hours to access the link. Once again, thank you for your help.

entry.title: Re: Bundles Now Live in SAP for Me - A Breakthrough in Outage Communication!
entry.content:
Hi,

great to see this functionality I've heard of during the DSAG BTP Betriebstag already live. During that session I've asked if MTAs deployed to Cloud Foundry could appear directly as Bundles. Because an MTA combines most of the time the UI, Application and used Services into one deployable unit. So it would make sense to re-use this collection as a Bundle in me.sap.com.

Best Regards
Gregor

entry.title: Re: SAP UX Innovations in Public Cloud Products, Joule, AI, Entry Points, Apple Vision Pro and more
entry.content:
Dear Sundeep,

The feature "Copy and Paste in SAPUI5 tables" is available with SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01, with the SAPUI5 version 1.120. I have described this along with many other features in my blog post User Experience Advances with SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01 (Private Cloud and On-Premise).

Regards,

Tom

entry.title: Re: SAP Sales Cloud and SAP Service Cloud version 2 - Client Certificate authentication (Outbound)
entry.content:
Hi @AbinashNanda . While doing the conversion from .cer to .p12, its prompting to provide private key. Is it mandatory? Error received - No cert in -in file '<name of certificate file>.cer' matches private key.

Also I found an online tool (https://certificatetool.com/ssl-converter/cer/cer-to-p12) which helps in converting .cer to .p12 wherein private key is optional. Is it a viable tool to be used?

entry.title: Re: Enable Material Substitution in Sales Area of S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Michael,

Thanks for the interesting article. Do you know if there is a standard API to create Material Determination? I found the standard Material Substitution API but that seems to be linked to records in the application "Material Substitution" and not Material Determination.

Thanks,

Stefanie

entry.title: Re: Merging Spaces and Pages
entry.content:
Hi Kattia,

What a bummer 😅 it makes the usage of workzone very poor if it doesn't even have the features of a "classical" backend. Customer would expect integration into new products to have a seamless integration while SAP is promoting BTP and cloud foundry as a cloud single point of entry. As customer we expect the same level of integration and feature. Then it is only valid for SMEs (BTP/cFLP), clearly not for large organization..which is the target of SAP here. If a customer goes into the direction of this new nice features, it is not usable thought the product pushed by SAP, it is a show stopper and clearly who wants to put effort and redesign their fiory if only usable via the "old" gateway architecture?

I hope to see a near future all these very nice features available across all applicable architecture 😉
